description:
Today, when a plugin populates task.external with remote_key/remote_url (e.g. Jira ticket + URL), the values are only in bl show --json. The human render in src/commands/basic.rs::render_text omits the external map, so agents have to dig through JSON to find a remote ticket ID or URL.

Fix: in render_text, iterate task.external and print a compact 'remote:' block per plugin showing remote_key and remote_url when present. Match the style of the existing 'links:' block. Skip plugins whose object has neither field — don't dump arbitrary internals.

Add a unit/integration test covering the render path: a task with external.jira = {remote_key: PROJ-1, remote_url: ...} should surface both strings in bl show's plain output.
title: bl show: render external remote locations
